untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calendar-based condition (first five trading days of January) and multi-day sequential validation that cannot be expressed with allowed indicators and operators. The rule needs temporal/calendar logic (detect January, count trading days within month, verify each of 5 consecutive days closed up) which is not supported by the indicator set. Additionally, holding for 'entire year' requires year-boundary logic not expressible through indicator conditions.
translation_notes: This signal requires rule engine support for: (1) calendar/date-based filtering (January detection), (2) intra-month day counting, (3) sequential multi-bar validation (5 consecutive up closes), and (4) year-boundary holding periods. The core pattern cannot be translated into indicator-based conditions without custom temporal operators.
